title: poa laxa subsp. fernaldiana
intro: Poa laxa subsp. fernaldiana is a subspecies of grass native to North America, also known as fernald's bluegrass. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Poa laxa subsp. fernaldiana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its antioxidant properties may help protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
